task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the existing chart for Maria Gonzalez.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or chart is open, displaying the name 'Maria Gonzalez' and DOB '1978-04-12' (or April 12, 1978) in the patient header or active context.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the insurance or demographics section to add a policy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Insurance', 'Demographics', or 'Add Insurance' screen/modal is open within Maria Gonzalez's chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the insurance plan name and order are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts' is entered in the Insurance Provider/Plan Name field, and 'Primary' is selected or displayed for the insurance type/order.

task_completion.description: Verify the insurance ID and Group number are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value 'BCB993847210' is entered in the ID/Policy Number field, and 'GRP-55128' is entered in the Group Number field.

task_completion.description: Verify the policyholder/subscriber information is set to the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The relationship to subscriber is set to 'Self', or 'Maria Gonzalez' is explicitly listed as the policyholder/subscriber.

task_completion.description: Verify the copay amount is entered and the insurance record is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '30' or '$30' is entered in the Copay field, and there is evidence the form was submitted (e.g., a success message, or the new insurance details appear in the patient's saved insurance list).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the medical software's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web-based or desktop EHR/medical application, not a terminal, command prompt, or direct database client (like MySQL).

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not create a new patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent searched for and selected the existing patient. There should be no screenshots showing a 'Create New Patient' or 'Add Patient' workflow being completed for Maria Gonzalez.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the data into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The insurance details are typed into the specific form fields of the medical software, not temporarily pasted into a text editor, notepad, or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient to verify: Maria Gonzalez (DOB: 1978-04-12). Expected Plan Name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts. Expected Copay: 30. Expected Order: Primary. ID: BCB993847210. Group: GRP-55128.
